stemHtml: Which statement best explains what a basic RAIM check verifies with regard to SBAS availability?

options.a: Basic RAIM checks GNSS satellite geometry and also verifies SBAS augmentation availability.
options.b: Basic RAIM only checks GNSS availability; it does not check SBAS augmentation, which must be verified separately (e.g., via NOTAM).
options.c: Basic RAIM checks SBAS availability automatically if the aircraft is equipped with WAAS/EGNOS receivers.
options.d: Basic RAIM is no longer required when flying in SBAS-covered areas.
